title: Locked account password reset

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] User account locked after failed login attempts
servicenow_seed.description: Caller cannot sign into Windows or email after 5 failed attempts. They have a meeting in 30 minutes.

correct_steps: Validate identity using employee ID and callback or manager confirmation
Unlock account and reset password if needed
Force password change at next login
Confirm login works and send caller comment
rationale: Password resets are Tier 1 only after identity verification. Do not reset accounts without verification.
hints: This is not a network issue if the account is locked in AD.
Document the verification method before the reset.
learning_objectives: Practice identity verification before account changes

tool_clues.ad: Account status: Locked out. Bad password count: 5. MFA active.
